message:
fix(tui): make resize evidence logging opt-in to prevent disk exhaustion (#108)

The resize_evidence.jsonl file was written unconditionally whenever BOCPD
was enabled (the default). On platforms where the TUI renders a blank
screen (e.g. Windows), the spin loop generated ~300 MB/s of evidence
data, exhausting disk space within hours.

Two changes:
1. Evidence logging is now opt-in: set FTUI_RECORD_RESIZE=1 to enable.
   Without this env var the file is never created.
2. Even when enabled, the 50 MiB size cap from frankentui's evidence
   sink prevents unbounded growth.

Closes #108.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
